prompt:

if the "Item 9B" heading appears on this page, take the 5 lines just before it; otherwise Item 9A continues to the bottom, so take the last 5 lines of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
